# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: website-static-assets-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      publicAccessPrevention: inherited
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    cors:
    - origin:
      - https://yourdomain.com
      method:
      - GET
      - HEAD
      responseHeader:
      - Content-Type
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          numNewerVersions: 3
          isLive: false

- name: website-bucket-iam-binding
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.website-static-assets-bucket.name)
  accessControl:
    bindings:
    - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
      members:
      - allUsers
      condition:
        title: Public read for website assets only
        description: Allow public read access to website content
        expression: resource.name.startsWith('projects/_/buckets/') && resource.type == 'storage.googleapis.com/Object'

- name: website-bucket-logging
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: NEARLINE
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: 90

- name: enable-logging-on-website-bucket
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.patch
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.website-static-assets-bucket.name)
    logging:
      logBucket: $(ref.website-bucket-logging.name)
      logObjectPrefix: website-access-logs/

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.website-static-assets-bucket.name)
- name: bucketUrl
  value: https://storage.googleapis.com/$(ref.website-static-assets-bucket.name)
- name: websiteUrl
  value: https://storage.googleapis.com/$(ref.website-static-assets-bucket.name)/index.html
